since_last: 36% of 101 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.74%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.56% · BTC -2.19% · Gold -2.34% · Nasdaq100 -2.33%. 36% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.74%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.74%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.36%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -15.45%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.94%, GEV +4.89%, HON +4.87%, CBRS +4.55%, FIX +2.35%. Laggards: TSLA -15.45%, CRNC -8.37%, GOOGL -7.01%, SYM -5.13%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.69% at $117.21
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
